heading: Periodic re-examination of production requirements
label: 8723 Periodic re-examination of production requirements
text: The Secretary shall from time to time reexamine the need for the production of petroleum from oil shale for national defense when that production is authorized under . If he finds that the authorized quantity is no longer needed, he shall reduce production to the amount currently needed for national defense.section 8722 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8723 was renumbered .section 9263 of this title

Amendments2018—, substituted “section 8722” for “section 7422”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(d)(5)section 7423 of this title1976— struck out “of the Navy” after “Secretary” and “or products” after “petroleum”.Pub. L. 94–2581962— directed the Secretary to re­examine, from time to time, the need for production of products from oil shale.Pub. L. 87–796
